prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约5822→6067→6757→8255→9021，连续5年逐年后移，累计后移约3200名，呈明显下降趋势；2025年基准约9021名；该校在福建省物理类招生计划2021年32人、2022年34人、2023年28人、2024年29人、2025年27人，2026年计划25人，较2025年减少2人，连续两年缩招，竞争进一步加剧。\ n211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第66名，近年排名稳定在65–72名区间，属于中上层次财经类院校。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 2026年声誉评价为中 性/混合，仅涉及预约入校政策讨论，无负面舆情；抖音热度总排名第92位，评价为一般，短视频曝光量偏低；近5年无投档线断档或暴跌记录，报考心理稳定；应用经济学A+（全国顶尖）、工商管理A、统计学A-，均为财经类核心学科，与该校招生专业高度匹配，对财经方向考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 财经类专业整体 热度近年有所降温，但应用经济学、金融学等核心专业仍保持较高关注度；福建省2026年普通高考总人数约267900人，较2025年252348人增加约6.2%，其中物理类按历史比例估算 约203872人，较2025年192096人增加约6.1%，考生规模扩大加剧竞争。；西南财经大学位于四川省成都市，非本省院校，福 建省考生对其无特殊地域偏好；该校在福建省招生计划占比较小（约25–32人/年），属跨省招生正常规模。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年招生计划进一步 缩招（25人，较2025年减少2人）、福建省物理类考生规模扩大约6.1%等因素，预计2026年竞争较2025年进一步加剧。在2025年基准9021名基础上，预测最低位次约8650名（位次 数字减小=更易进），区间8150–9150名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 5822 → 6067 → 6757 → 8255 → 9021, shifting backward for five consecutive years, with a cumulative shift of about 3200 places, showing a clear downward trend; the 2025 baseline is approximately 9021; the enrollment plan for this university in Fujian Province Physics Category was 32 in 2021, 34 in 2022, 28 in 2023, 29 in 2024, 27 in 2025, and the 2026 plan is 25, a decrease of 2 from 2025, with two consecutive years of enrollment reduction, further intensifying competition. \ n211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 66th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in the 65–72 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of finance and economics institutions.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: The 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, only involving discussions on appointment-based campus entry policies, with no negative public opinion; Douyin heat ranking is 92nd overall, rated as average, with low short video exposure; no record of admission cutoff line gaps or sharp drops in the past 5 years, stable application psychology; Applied Economics A+ (top in the country), Business Administration A, Statistics A-, all core disciplines in finance and economics, highly matching the university's enrollment majors, strongly attracting candidates interested in finance and economics.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The overall popularity of finance and economics majors has cooled down in recent years, but core majors such as Applied Economics and Finance still maintain high attention; the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Fujian Province in 2026 is approximately 267,900, an increase of about 6.2% from 252,348 in 2025, of which Physics Category is estimated at about 203,872 based on historical proportions, an increase of about 6.1% from 192,096 in 2025, with the expansion of candidate scale intensifying competition. ; Southwestern University of Finance and Economics is located in Chengdu, Sichuan Province, not a local institution, and Fujian candidates have no special regional preference for it; the enrollment plan for this university in Fujian Province accounts for a relatively small proportion (about 25–32 people/year), which is a normal scale for cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward shift trend of historical rankings, the further reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (25 people, a decrease of 2 from 2025), and the expansion of Fujian Province Physics Category candidates by about 6.1%, it is expected that competition in 2026 will further intensify compared to 2025. Based on the 2025 baseline of 9021, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 8650 (a smaller ranking number means easier entry), with a range of 8150–9150.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Finance (Smart Finance and Blockchain Finance)
- Accounting (Certified Public Accountant Specialization Direction)
- Computer Science and Technology (Basic Disciplines Top-Notch Experimental Class)
- Finance (Economics and Management International Innovation Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Finance (including Finance, Financial Engineering, etc.)
- Statistics (including Statistics, Data Science)
- Actuarial Science
- Economics (National Economics Basic Talent Training Base Class)
- Business Administration (Accounting School).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Management Science and Engineering (including Computational Finance, etc.)
- Financial Engineering
- Financial Technology
- Digital Economy (Basic Disciplines Top-Notch Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 8150–9150, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<8150), you can focus on Tier 1 majors such as Finance (Smart Finance and Blockchain Finance) and Accounting (Certified Public Accountant Specialization Direction); if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>9150), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors to secure admission to the university.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 1297 → 1338 → 1462 → 1405 → 1504, showing a fluctuating but generally backward trend over the past 5 years. The 2025 baseline is about 1504, a cumulative backward shift of about 207 places compared to 2021. The enrollment plan for History Category in Fujian Province was 22 in 2021, 20 in 2022, 15 in 2023, 14 in 2024, and 12 in 2025, with a planned 11 for 2026. It has been shrinking year by year for 5 consecutive years, with a further reduction of 1 in 2026 compared to 2025, indicating a clear trend of enrollment contraction and intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 66th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of finance and economics institutions. The 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no negative public opinion; Douyin popularity is average; no record of admission line breaks or sharp drops in the past 5 years, indicating stable application psychology. Applied Economics is rated A+ (top in China), Business Administration A, Statistics A-, which highly match the History Category enrollment majors (Finance, Accounting, Economics, etc.), maintaining sustained appeal for liberal arts finance and economics candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The overall popularity of finance and economics majors has cooled somewhat in recent years, but core majors such as Finance and Accounting still maintain high attention. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the Fujian Province general college entrance examination is approximately 267,900, an increase of about 6.2% compared to 2025. Among them, History Category candidates are estimated at about 64,028 based on historical proportions, an increase of about 6.3% from 60,252 in 2025, with the expanded candidate pool intensifying competition. Southwestern University of Finance and Economics is located in Chengdu, Sichuan Province, not a local institution. Its enrollment plan for History Category in Fujian Province has been shrinking year by year (from 22 to 11), with a small cross-provincial enrollment scale and no special regional preference influence.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating backward trend of historical rankings, the further reduction of the 2026 enrollment plan to 11 (a decrease of 1 compared to 2025), and the expansion of Fujian Province's History Category candidate pool by about 6.3%, competition in 2026 is expected to intensify further compared to 2025. Based on the 2025 baseline of 1504, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1449 (a smaller ranking number means easier admission), with a range of 1188–1710.
